Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reaper Division]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Reaper Division was created for the purpose of removing threats to preserve existence.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Reaper Division focuses on intervening where others cannot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Reaper Division is hanging by a thin thread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper Division has jurisdiction in Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper Division's value is to be established by Lindon's victory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper Division is a newly formed group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Reaper Division is a division that the Abidan of the Wolf Division disdains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Reaper Division is currently undergoing operations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Reaper Division is a division within the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Reaper Division has delayed or reversed the destruction of one hundred and forty-one worlds in its first two standard years.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
